_meta.purpose: Centralised corporate look-and-feel applied to every STING-generated deliverable (docx, xlsx, pdf, html, bcf comments, ifc properties) so every export carries the same masthead, palette, footer disclaimer, and project metadata regardless of origin command.

document_defaults.disclaimer: This document is issued by {{company_name}} and shall not be reproduced, in whole or part, without prior written consent.

token_rules: All MiniWord .docx templates resolve {{company_name}}/{{company_short}}/{{project_code}}/{{document_code}}/{{date}}/{{year}}/{{author}}/{{revision}}/{{status}} from ProjectInformation + corporate brand at render time.
CSV / XML exporters prepend two metadata rows: '# Generated by {{company_name}}, {{date}}' and '# Project: {{project_code}}'.
PDF exports set document properties {Title,Author,Subject,Keywords} = {document_code, author, project_code, company_short}.
BCF topics (ACC / BIMcollab / Navisworks) use {{company_short}}-{{issue_seq}} as ReferenceLink and include disclaimer in the first CoordComment.
IFC Pset_Common Tag value defaults to {{company_short}}-{{pfv_uuid}} on every STING-authored element.
